title: 4 Bunches Red Rose Artificial Flowers, Silk Roses Bouquet Fake Flower for Graves Home Wedding Party Decoration
features: Real Looking Silk Roses: the flowers are made of high quality silk fabric, realistic and vivid natural appearance. The flower stems are made of wire wrapped plastic, the stems can be trimmed or bent, the flower heads can be used to decorate cakes or DIY flower decorations.

Artificial bouquet is easy to maintain: these fake flowers won't wilt and don't need to be watered or exposed to the sun, the fake rose bouquet is a good choice for those of us who don't have time to take care of fake flowers.

Wide use for home decor: Artificial roses and silk flowers are suitable for bridal bouquets, wedding parties, DIY flower arrangements or any centrepieces. It will be a decoration for kitchen, living room, dining table, bedroom, balcony, garden, office, hotel, Halloween, Christmas and other occasions, adding colour and vitality to your indoor and outdoor space.

SIZE & PACKAGING: Includes 4 bunches of roses, each with 11 small roses and some eucalyptus leaves. The length of the bouquets is approximately 32cm/12.6 inches and the diameter of the flower heads is approximately 1.18 inches. Note: The picture shows 5-6 bunches of artificial flowers which will present a very nice visual effect.

Note: Artificial flowers may be flattened during transport. Simply press in the opposite direction of the previous flattening. and then gently adjust each stem by hand to restore the original fluffiness. These Eucalyptus roses will soon regain their original fullness and vibrancy.
